storiesPage.title: Yan-Zhong Stories
storiesPage.description: Real journeys, honest lessons, and moments of growth worth passing on. Every submission is reviewed before publication.

storiesPage.emptyDescription: Share the first story and leave a useful reference for those who follow.
storiesPage.submitHintDescription: Submissions now live in your profile, where you can save your work, track review status, and manage past drafts.

about.memberSchool: A member school of Shenzhen Xin'an Education Group
about.description: Shenzhen Yanchuan High School is a modern public boarding school within the Xin'an Education Group. It brings together aerospace education, digital learning, and individual development through a distinctive curriculum and campus culture.

events.description: Find reunions, online talks, and community gatherings.

teachers.privacyNote: To protect privacy, unverified phone numbers, email addresses, and other sensitive contact details are not published.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Use your account to enter the Yan-Zhong Alumni Port.

register.title: Create an Alumni Account
register.description: Verify your email to join. An internal access code completes identity verification immediately; otherwise, submit for manual review.
register.internalCodeHint: Provided privately by an alumni or event organizer. You can still register without one.
register.accessAfterEmail: Your access code was accepted. Verify your email to enter the alumni space.
register.reviewAfterEmail: After email verification, your identity details enter administrator review.
register.resendVerification: No verification email? Send it again
register.successEmail: Your account is ready. Check your inbox for the verification email.
register.successNoEmail: Your account is ready, but the email was not delivered. Use the verification page to resend it.
register.openRegistration: Create an alumni account and join the Alumni Port

reset.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. Sign in again.
reset.emailSuccess: The reset email has been sent. Check your inbox.
reset.failed: The request could not be completed. Try again later.

verify.reviewPendingMessage: Your email is verified and your identity details are now under review.
verify.invalidMessage: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.networkMessage: The verification service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
verify.sentMessage: The request was submitted. Check your inbox.
verify.sendFailedMessage: The email could not be sent. Check the address and try again.

status.emailNotVerifiedDescription: The link in the verification email confirms ownership. Your identity information enters the admin review process afterward.
status.pendingDescription: Your application is in the admin review queue. Once approved, you can sign in and use the alumni space.
status.rejectedDescription: The identity review was not approved. Contact an administrator to check your name, cohort, class, and other application details.
status.disabledDescription: This account has been disabled and cannot sign in. Contact an administrator if access should be restored.
status.pendingProgress: Current progress: waiting for admin review

users.description: Review alumni identity and account status for registered users
users.emptyDescription: Processed registration requests will be archived here
users.name: Name
users.revokeAdminFirst: Revoke this user's administrator role first

registrationPolicy.title: Registration Policy
registrationPolicy.description: Manage the internal access code and manual review path
registrationPolicy.loadFailed: Unable to load the registration policy
registrationPolicy.saveFailed: Unable to save the registration policy
registrationPolicy.codeDescription: Members with the code receive alumni access after email verification. Everyone else enters manual review.
registrationPolicy.enableHint: Disabling the code keeps its hash so it can be enabled again later.
registrationPolicy.keepCodePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current code
registrationPolicy.flowEmail: 1. Every account must verify its email. The access code never bypasses this step.
registrationPolicy.flowCode: 2. A valid code confirms alumni identity and grants access after email verification.
registrationPolicy.flowReview: 3. Applications without a valid code enter the user review queue.
registrationPolicy.securityNote: Only a secure hash is stored, so the current code cannot be viewed. Rotate it when needed and distribute it through trusted private channels.

error.description: The admin page could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.

home.heroTitle:
From Yan-Zhong,
we find one another again
home.heroTagline: We remember our classmates and the paths we have taken. Here, Yan-Zhong stories endure, alumni reconnect, and new journeys begin.
home.whisperReturn: Return · Still on the same road
home.updatesDescription: Events, news, and alumni stories meet here, so every return reveals how the community keeps growing.
home.pathsDescription: Reconnect with classmates, read their stories, and trace the paths of Yan-Zhong alumni. The most meaningful connections stay within easy reach.
home.pathAlumniDescription: After verification, explore the directory and city map while personal information stays protected.
home.pathStoriesDescription: Explore alumni stories and school memories, or contribute your own experience and archives.
home.pathEcosystemDescription: Learn how the platform, access boundaries, non-profit governance, and participation fit together.
home.signalTitle: Across every distance, still within reach
home.signalDescription: Signals from different cities and different paths meet again in a shared Yan-Zhong memory. Follow the constellation to find classmates and see where their journeys have led.
home.signalLoginAction: Sign In to Enter the Directory
home.ecosystemTitle: Turn one reunion into a lasting journey
home.ecosystemDescription: The Alumni Port preserves more than names: stories, events, learning resources, and shared memories continue to grow here. The retro channel is one window into the wider ecosystem.
home.ecosystemPointContent: Stories, memories, events, and school resources form a lasting content network.
home.ecosystemPointPrivacy: Public content and verified data are separated; alumni profiles are not public display material.
home.ecosystemPointParticipation: Contributions, corrections, events, and technical collaboration each have a clear path.
home.guideTitle: Understand the Alumni Port in 30 seconds
home.guideDescription: This is a non-profit platform built by alumni. Public stories are open to everyone, while alumni records and distribution data require verification.
home.guideNonprofitDescription: Independent from the school, free to use, and maintained by alumni volunteers.
home.guideVerifyDescription: Register and verify your alumni identity to access the directory, map, and collaboration features.
home.guideBuildDescription: Explore stories, events, and resources, or submit memories, corrections, and contributions.
home.joinDesc: Meet outstanding alumni, share your experiences, and get more resources and opportunities. Wherever you are, this is your spiritual home.
home.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This site is co-built by alumni and maintained by Yan-Zhong Alumni Club. It is not an official school platform. The site is non-profit and free, intended only for emotional connection, memory preservation, and alumni community service.

correction.title: Identity Record Correction
correction.description: Search and review your current record, then request changes to your name, cohort, or class. Edit other profile fields directly in your account.
correction.lockedTitle: This form handles locked identity fields
correction.lockedDescription: Name, cohort, and class require review. Contact details, school, major, city, and industry can be edited from your profile.
correction.contactDescription: Correction requests use the contact details in your profile for follow-up. Add them before submitting.
correction.signInDescription: Sign in to access your profile and submit a correction.
correction.submitRequiresLoginDescription: You may search and review records first, but signing in is required to submit.
correction.emptyDescription: Check the name. Contact an administrator if the record is missing or incorrect.
correction.noChangePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current value
correction.reasonPlaceholder: Describe what should change and why
correction.reviewDescription: Approved changes update automatically. You can submit another request for a different record.

errors.signIn: Sign in before submitting a correction.
errors.loadingContact: Loading your contact details. Try again in a moment.
errors.contactRequired: Add contact details in your profile first.
errors.reasonLength: The reason must contain 5 to 1000 characters.
errors.noChanges: The requested values match the current record.

privacy.title: Privacy & Compliance
privacy.description: One page explains data use, content boundaries, and user rights across the site. Other pages no longer repeat long notices.
privacy.scopeTitle: One policy for the entire Alumni Port
privacy.scopeDescription: These rules cover public pages, verified alumni features, and administrator-published content on yanchuaner.cn.

sections.identityDescription: This site is built and maintained by alumni volunteers. It is independent from the school, free to use, and does not monetize alumni data.
sections.dataDescription: Alumni records come from member registration, legacy rosters, and reviewed corrections. School and community content comes from public sources, administrators, and alumni submissions.
sections.accessDescription: Public pages do not expose contact details, street addresses, or precise locations. The directory, city map, and identity-linked data require verified membership.
sections.cardDescription: Memorial cards, achievements, and school archives preserve community culture. They are not official identification, certification, or commercial endorsement.
sections.contentDescription: Admissions, university, and study content supports peer exchange. It does not replace examination authorities, university websites, official admissions rules, or professional advice.
sections.rightsDescription: Alumni may submit identity corrections or contact the stewards to access, correct, or delete information associated with them.

privacy.contactDescription: Describe what should be accessed, corrected, or deleted and provide enough information to verify your identity. The stewards will respond after verification.

channels.historyContent: Shenzhen Yanchuan High School was established in 2021 as a modern public boarding school. Scientific inquiry and humanistic growth guide its aerospace-oriented curriculum and campus culture.
channels.aerospaceContent: The school develops aerospace learning spaces and maker courses in spacecraft design and satellite remote-sensing models, bringing the spirit of exploration into everyday learning.
channels.communityContent: The Yan-Zhong Alumni Port is co-built by alumni and volunteers. It stays non-profit and focused on connection, shared resources, and a lasting digital home for the community.

ecosystem.title: Yanchuan Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: A digital ecosystem built with alumni: connecting school culture, the alumni network, learning resources, and shared memories while keeping clear boundaries between public content, verified data, and volunteer governance.
ecosystem.networkTitle: Four nodes form the Alumni Port
ecosystem.networkDescription: This is not a pile of features. Each node serves a lasting need and connects through shared identity, content, and governance rules.

nodes.schoolDescription: Organize school history, educational characteristics, and public sources so shared memory begins with a trustworthy foundation.
nodes.alumniDescription: Identity verification protects the directory, city map, and collaboration features, with personal data private by default.
nodes.memoryDescription: Preserve stories, images, news, and events as a searchable community archive that can be corrected over time.
nodes.governanceDescription: Alumni volunteers sustain trust through review, corrections, records, and open collaboration.

ecosystem.capabilitiesTitle: Designed around real relationships, not traffic
ecosystem.capabilitiesDescription: Every feature supports discovery, preservation, mutual help, or participation. Growth never depends on ads, paywalls, or public personal profiles.

capabilities.mapDescription: Verified members can explore alumni distribution and essential identity details to reconnect with classmates and local peers.
capabilities.contentDescription: Preserve personal journeys, school images, and shared memories so future students can understand how alumni grew.
capabilities.eventsDescription: Publish public updates, organize online and offline events, and maintain clear registration workflows.
capabilities.supportDescription: Bring together teacher messages, learning methods, university experience, and alumni Q&A for current students.
capabilities.correctionDescription: Traceable requests keep cohort, class, and identity records accurate over time.
capabilities.buildDescription: Code, documentation, and operating practices are progressively opened so alumni can contribute across disciplines.

ecosystem.accessTitle: Knowing what stays private matters more than showing more
ecosystem.accessDescription: Access follows the task and identity level. Language and theme can change globally, but privacy boundaries never change with the interface.

access.publicDescription: School information, public stories, news, events, and this ecosystem guide are open so newcomers can understand the platform.
access.verifiedDescription: The directory, map, and identity-linked alumni data require both email ownership and identity review.
access.stewardsDescription: Content review, corrections, and site configuration follow least privilege and audit records, separate from member access.

ecosystem.governanceTitle: A comfortable experience must rest on trust
ecosystem.governanceDescription: The visual layer can feel light, while the rules remain explicit. Clear boundaries protect alumni and leave room for long-term participation.

governance.nonprofitDescription: The platform is free, carries no ads, and does not monetize alumni data.
governance.privacyDescription: Only information required for the service is collected, with sensitive data separated by verification and role.
governance.accuracyDescription: Public sources and historical records change; users can submit evidence and stewards retain a review trail.
governance.participationDescription: Content, events, engineering, and operations welcome contributors under security, attribution, and community rules.

ecosystem.extensionsTitle: Five focused directions for a broader ecosystem
ecosystem.extensionsDescription: The main site remains responsible for identity, public content, and governance. AI, API, and the co-building lab are now in preview; other services will follow real community needs.
ecosystem.extensionsNote: These nodes share the ecosystem's non-profit principles, but accounts and personal data will not be shared by default. Each service needs its own identity boundary, privacy notice, moderation model, and accountable maintainers before launch.

extensions.aiDescription: A guided web entry point for useful AI capabilities, with clear onboarding, practical tools, and explicit usage boundaries for alumni and students.
extensions.techDescription: Project profiles, repository links, and beginner guides for mini programs, apps, and agents. Web development material remains on the main site.
extensions.forumDescription: A lightweight forum for literature, history, politics, and philosophy, with more room for discussion than the main site while retaining basic moderation and reporting tools.
extensions.apiDescription: Unified documentation, examples, and access paths that lower the barrier to different AI services while making keys, quotas, and compliance boundaries explicit.
extensions.birthdayDescription: Opt-in birthday recognition, gentle greeting pages, and reminders. Birthday data stays private by default and the service can be disabled at any time.

ecosystem.nextTitle: Turn one visit into a lasting connection
ecosystem.nextDescription: Verify your alumni identity, preserve a story, correct a record, or contribute through the open-source repository. Ideas for the extension nodes and their governance are equally welcome when grounded in real community needs.

ai.title: Yanchuan AI Workspace
ai.description: Enter through the alumni identity layer while the API platform manages model access, quotas, and audit records.
ai.panelDescription: Chat, image, and future tools use the API control plane. Provider credentials are never stored in the browser.
ai.capability: DeepSeek chat and GPT Image are available today, with additional tools added only when they serve a clear need.
ai.boundary: Verified members only. Usage, quotas, and model permissions are managed centrally by the API platform.

api.title: Yanchuan Developer API
api.description: One OpenAI-compatible interface for alumni projects, the AI workspace, and future agents.
api.panelDescription: Create personal API keys and review models and usage after signing in. New accounts begin with zero quota until allocation.
api.capability: Use the same interface from scripts, mini programs, apps, and agents without switching provider-specific clients.
api.boundary: Keys remain private to their owner and are constrained by model allowlists, quotas, RPM/TPM, and audit policy.
